title: Align backend, frontend, and contract-deployer service with current ABIs
description:
Align backend, frontend, and contract-deployer service with current ABIs

Make sure off-chain systems can safely read from and write to the current contracts.

Acceptance criteria:

* Backend/frontend ABIs use `deployTokenWithAllocations`, current params tuple including oracle price and vesting config, current UsageFeeRouter API, and current event names.
* Contract-deployer service environment points to current Sepolia addresses and passes integration tests.
* Frontend wallet flows handle approvals, buys, sells, IBR disabled-sell state, slippage/deadline errors, and network mismatch.
* API usage fee depositor path is tested against Sepolia contracts.
* Production env var and SSM/secret updates are documented without exposing secrets.
